fields.name: Description
fields.default: Your site is live on a global CDN in seconds. No build pipeline, no server config, no DevOps.

default.title: Custom domains
default.body: Automatic SSL. Point your domain, you're live.

default.title: Snapshots
default.body: Back up before big changes. One-click restore.

default.title: Publish requests
default.body: Publishers request, developers approve. No surprises.

default.title: Optimized media
default.body: Auto-converted to WebP. No giant files by accident.

default.title: Portable output
default.body: Download as ZIP. Host anywhere. You own your site.

default.title: Stripe checkout
default.body: Lightweight payments when you need them.
